summary: AI capability boundaries, prompt/RAG/memory/profile/coaching architecture, fallback, and observability are defined. Model selection now includes market candidate screening and shortlist recommendations, but real API benchmark has not been executed.

findings.issue: AI and deterministic responsibilities are separated.
No final model can be selected before running real API benchmark cases.
findings.evidence: model_selection_plan.md includes official_source_snapshot, candidate_model_pool, model_comparison_matrix, benchmark_status=not_run, and shortlist_recommendations.
findings.required_fix: Before development, verify candidate model docs, pricing, availability, and run BM-01 through BM-06.

findings.issue: Sensitive learning data deletion and profile reset are included.
findings.evidence: conversation_memory_plan.md and ai_technical_architecture.md include clear_control and memory_profile_storage.

findings.issue: High-risk academic integrity requests have a dedicated guardrail path.
findings.evidence: prompt_architecture.md defines integrity_guardrail and ai_capability_map.md defines AI-06.

required_fixes: Verify model docs and pricing before final selection.
Run BM-01 through BM-06 before enabling AI scoring in production.
reminder: AI information and benchmark outputs are decision signals only. The user must verify truth, availability, and actual output quality before committing to a model or technical route.
